MAHA LAKSHMI YANTRA
68
Aghori.it

Lakshmi Yantra
Mantra
namaḥ kamala vāsinyai svāhā
oṁ śrī mahālakṣmi namaḥ
aṇimne namaḥ, mahimne namaḥ, garimṇe namaḥ, ladhimne
namaḥ, prāptyai namaḥ, prākāmyai namaḥ, iśitāyai namaḥ,
vashitāyai namaḥ
vidhālakṣmi, vaibhāvalakṣmi, amṛtalakṣmi, kāmalalakṣmi,
satyalakṣmi, bhagalalakṣmi, yogalakṣmi, āthalakṣmi
